samples.xml_description:
<module id="right_shifter">
    <description>Implement a right shifter.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="d">Input signal to be right-shifted.</input>
        <output id="q" width_description="[7:0]">Output signal representing the result of the right shift operation.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="width" value="8"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic>
            <reg id="q" type="state" width_description="[7:0]">Register for storing the right-shifted result.</reg>
            <always>
                <clock_edge_event>
                    <if>
                        <equals>
                            <component id="clk"/>
                            <const id="1"/>
                        </equals>
                    </if>
                    <then>
                        <non_blocking>
                            <binary_op id="q" operator=">>">
                                <component id="q"/>
                                <const id="1"/>
                            </binary_op>
                            <index_access>
                                <component id="q"/>
                                <const id="7"/>
                            </index_access>
                            <component id="d"/>
                        </non_blocking>
                    </then>
                </always>
            </sequential_logic>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <task>
        <description>Initialize the register to 0.</description>
        <sequential>
            <non_blocking>
                <component id="q"/>
                <const id="0"/>
            </non_blocking>
        </sequential>
    </task>
</module>
